119 M5B M5B_RELIEF_BED 34b(M5b)Pressure Relieving Device(s) for Bed CHAR 1 Indicates the patient has received pressure relieving device(s) for the bed to manage skin problems in the past seven days. Includes air fluidized, low air loss therapy beds, flotation, water, or bubble mattress or pad placed on the bed. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
